title: Sherlog Lint-Plan Input
description: A structured plan submitted by an AI agent for pre-flight validation before code changes begin.

feature.description: Human-readable label for the feature or task being planned.

steps.description: Ordered list of intended implementation steps.

action.description: Short verb-phrase describing what this step does (e.g. 'implement protocol handler', 'add unit tests', 'update docs').

files.description: Repo-relative file paths that this step will create or modify.

rationale.description: Optional explanation of why this step is needed.

type.description: Classification of this step. Used for gap-coverage checks.
